overall.description: A cinematic third-person view from a video game showing a character standing on a lush tropical cliff edge. The camera slowly pans right to reveal a vast coastal bay with ancient ruins and distant futuristic towers. The scene features dense jungle vegetation, clear skies, and bright natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical cliff overlook with dense vegetation

events.description: holographic waypoint marker fades from view
coastal bay water becomes visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: standing still on cliff edge, looking out over the landscape with weapon on back

notable_agents.action: standing still at cliff edge, observing the horizon

entered.detail: moss-covered rocky outcrop at cliff edge where character stands
dense ferns and broadleaf plants surrounding the cliff edge
tall palm trees swaying in the breeze on the hillside
misty jungle-covered mountains fading into the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky tropical cliff edge surrounded by dense ferns and palm trees. A holographic marker fades from view as the camera begins a slow rightward pan, gradually revealing the coastal bay in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal overlook revealing submerged ancient ruins

events.description: ancient stone ruins emerge from the turquoise water as view expands
character shifts to left edge of frame, partially obscured by foliage

agents.ego_description: shifting to left side of frame while maintaining lookout position over the water

notable_agents.action: standing at cliff edge, partially obscured by foreground vegetation

entered.detail: turquoise coastal water with visible submerged structures
weathered stone ruins and broken columns rising from the water
tall slender futuristic structures visible on the distant shoreline

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning right, the character moves to the left edge of the frame, revealing a stunning turquoise bay filled with ancient submerged ruins. Tall futuristic towers become visible on the distant shore, contrasting with the natural jungle environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive coastal bay with distant futuristic structures

events.description: character exits frame left, revealing unobstructed panoramic view
futuristic towers become more prominent in the center of the view

agents.ego_description: no longer visible in frame, camera continues panoramic sweep of the landscape

entered.detail: rocky shoreline with scattered boulders on the right side of the bay

segments.scene_description: With the character no longer in view, the camera completes its panoramic sweep across the expansive coastal bay. The ancient ruins shift to the left as the futuristic towers dominate the center of the frame, surrounded by misty coastal atmosphere and clear turquoise waters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous rightward pan that transitions from an intimate jungle cliffside to a sweeping panoramic view of a futuristic coastal bay. It begins with a character standing among dense ferns and palm trees on a rocky edge, where a holographic marker fades away as the camera starts its movement. As the pan continues, the character shifts toward the edge of the frame to reveal a turquoise bay filled with ancient submerged ruins and distant, towering futuristic structures. The scene then expands fully as the character disappears from view, allowing the panoramic sweep to center on the contrasting skyline of advanced towers rising from the misty coastal atmosphere.
